Let me go area by area. On design, the new component library is almost done. On the data pipeline, things are stable. On security, we closed out the last two audit items.

He read through the entire report over lunch and sent back a bunch of comments.

Hi Dana, just a quick note on the budget review before Friday. I moved a few line items around and the totals still work.

On the ingestion service, we doubled throughput. On the query layer, we're seeing some slow spots. On storage, we're getting close to capacity.

Alright, uh quick tour of the roadmap items on the reporting feature we shipped the first version on the export tool we're still ironing out edge cases on the audit log um we haven't really started on permissions with think rethinking the whole model

Alright, quick tour of the roadmap items. On the reporting feature, we shipped the first version. On the export tool, we're still ironing out edge cases. On the audit log, we haven't really started. On permissions, we're rethinking the whole model.

Let me cover the big rocks. On the data warehouse migration, we're two weeks out. On the machine learning models, accuracy is up. On the dashboards, leadership finally has what they need.

We drove up to the lake house on Saturday. The heater was completely broken, and we had to drive into town to buy a space heater. By the time we got back, it was already dark out.
